entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, the crop evaluated for nematode resistance and tolerance

entities.name: RENIFORM NEMATODE
entities.description: Rotylenchulus reniformis, a pathogen affecting pigeonpea

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea genotypes to maintain growth and yield despite nematode infection

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea genotypes to limit the number of nematode egg masses

entities.name: GREENHOUSE TESTS
entities.description: Controlled environment evaluations used to screen for nematode resistance

entities.name: FIELD TESTS
entities.description: Evaluations conducted in natural or infested field conditions to assess tolerance

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location in India where pigeonpea genotypes were evaluated

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: NEMATODE EGG MASSES
entities.description: A trait used as a scale to measure resistance or susceptibility to reniform nematodes

entities.name: PLANT BIOMASS PRODUCTION
entities.description: A trait used to compare growth between treated and non-treated plots

entities.name: CARBOFTIRAN TREATMENT
entities.description: A method of treating plots to compare biomass production against non-treated plots

entities.name: PLANT VIGOUR
entities.description: A trait used for selection to enhance nematode tolerance

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: A trait used for selection to enhance nematode tolerance

entities.name: PLANT-TO-PROGENY ROW SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to enhance the level of tolerance in pigeonpea

entities.name: NEMATODE-SICK FIELD
entities.description: A field condition naturally infested with reniform nematodes used for selection

entities.name: PIGEONPEA LANDRACES
entities.description: Traditional varieties considered likely sources of nematode tolerance

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The facility where the identified nematode-tolerant pigeonpea lines are stored
